hero.tagline: Be your seed. Love your life.
hero.title_line1: A place to love your life,
hero.signup_desc: A place where you can express every side of yourself, and be accepted — that place doesn't exist yet.
hero.signup_note: We'll notify you at launch · Free · No spam

stat.label: Why DaiMe matters
stat.desc: 43% of teens have felt they 'want to disappear' or are struggling. Japan has one of the highest suicide rates among developed nations, and loneliness keeps rising.
stat.factor1: Loss of self amid growing social diversity
stat.factor2: Performing a version of yourself, shaped by social media algorithms
stat.factor3: Fewer chances to decide for yourself, as convenience grows
stat.core: There's no place to express your true, many-sided self — and be accepted.
stat.transition: So DaiMe is building a place where you can simply be yourself.
stat.flower_word: — The yellow daisy means "being your true self."
stat.origin_conclusion: To cherish yourself, just as you are.

how.label: What you can do on DaiMe
how.title: Grow yourself in three steps.
how.step1_title: Put yourself into words with tags
how.step1_desc: Express what you love and what you struggle with, all as tags. Naming it is the first step to seeing yourself.
how.step2_title: Meet people who share your words
how.step2_desc: Connect with people who share your tags in anonymous rooms. You were never alone.
how.step3_title: Watch yourself grow in My Garden
how.step3_desc: Your tags bloom into daisies, growing your own garden. Self-acceptance you can actually see.

tags.label: Tags on DaiMe
tags.title: Flower or seed — both are you.
tags.daisy_desc: What you love and what you're good at. The parts of you that shine.
tags.seed_desc: Your weaknesses and shadows. Those are precious seeds too.
tags.bridge: Connect anonymously with people who share your tags. Your words become someone's place to belong.

growth.label: A story of growth
growth.title: From a seed, into a flower.
growth.stage3_quote: "It takes a village to raise a person." — African proverb

quotes.label: Words of growth
quotes.title: Let these words push your next step forward.
quotes.quote1_main: You put it into words. That alone is already amazing.
quotes.quote1_sub: Trying to understand yourself is something most people never do. You've already taken a step forward.
quotes.quote2_main: Someone out there shares your words. You were never alone.
quotes.quote2_sub: Your words are reaching someone's heart. That's something truly valuable.
quotes.quote3_main: You faced it well. You're allowed to be exactly as you are.
quotes.quote3_sub: Flowers bloom, and seeds grow. DaiMe is a place where you can love yourself.

cta.tagline: Be your seed. Love your life.
cta.title: Why not plant your seed?
cta.desc: Light and shadow, just as they are. Begin your journey of self-love with DaiMe. We'll let you know the moment we launch.

form.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
form.successMessage: Thanks for signing up! 🌱 We'll let you know when we launch
